acceptance_targets: [chapter_01_f001] PASS if the revised paragraphs at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:45 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:147 let a reader infer both characters' stress patterns without any sentence that explicitly labels the pattern or paraphrases the style bible. FAIL if the rewritten passage still reads like diagnostic character-sheet commentary rather than scene-made observation.

[chapter_01_f002] PASS if, on reread of the revised beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:35, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:273, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:307, no more than two of those five moments still rely on back-to-back `It was/That was` declarative emphasis and each beat now lands through a visibly distinct sentence shape. FAIL if most of those turns still arrive in the same declarative wrapper.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised paragraphs at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:45 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:147 let a reader infer both characters' stress patterns without any sentence that explicitly labels the pattern or paraphrases the style bible. FAIL if the rewritten passage still reads like diagnostic character-sheet commentary rather than scene-made observation.
findings.evidence: The narration starts paraphrasing style-bible stress tells instead of dramatizing them: "She got tidier, quieter, and more exact" at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:45 and "That was Marisol under stress exactly as Paloma accused: more specific, never less" at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:147.
findings.problem: The chapter occasionally sounds like it is quoting its own character notes. That flattens otherwise strong close-third work and creates mild process leakage: instead of letting Paloma's and Marisol's pressure states emerge from behavior, the prose diagnoses them in near-bible language.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the paragraphs beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:45 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:147 so Paloma's near-empty steadiness and Marisol's stress-tightened over-specificity are conveyed through fresh scene behavior, physical response, and dialogue texture. Keep the same story beats, but remove any sentence that directly summarizes the character template and replace it with details Teresa or Marisol would concretely observe in the moment.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, on reread of the revised beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:35, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:273, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:307, no more than two of those five moments still rely on back-to-back `It was/That was` declarative emphasis and each beat now lands through a visibly distinct sentence shape. FAIL if most of those turns still arrive in the same declarative wrapper.
findings.evidence: Several major turns land on the same emphatic construction: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:35, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:273, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:307 all rely on repeated `It was/That was` declarative emphasis.
findings.problem: The recurrence turns a once-effective cadence into a visible tic. Mercy, recognition, paperwork revelation, helpless advice, and final reckoning all arrive in nearly the same sentence shape, which blunts the chapter's rhythmic control and makes key beats feel less discovered than delivered.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the emphasis beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:35, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:87, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:273, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:307 so they do not all hinge on the same `It was/That was` setup. Preserve the underlying meaning of each beat, but vary the local syntax through concrete noun-led openings, action-led turns, or longer freighted sentences that break on the impact word instead of announcing it first.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the novel's uncomfortable overlap of sanitation, state violence, labor dependence, and family love. When an edge case appears, prefer the version that keeps physical consequence, class coercion, and emotional contradiction visible on the page rather than the version that makes characters cleaner, nobler, or easier to forgive.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns away at the exact moment bodily, economic, or moral consequence should become legible, revise toward specificity. Omission is only valid when residue, aftermath, and changed behavior keep the pressure fully present.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms should mark emphasis, bureaucracy, class performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate dense procedural chapters with quieter aftermath, meals, night holds, confession scenes, and dark-comic institutional theater. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same rhythm of scene count, dialogue density, or pressure delivery; vary between confrontation, drift, revelation, ritual preparation, humiliation, public spectacle, and stillness under pressure.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, infrastructural, unsentimental, and specific about procedures without becoming jargon-drunk. Abstract thought should rise from physical consequence instead of replacing it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored primarily to Marisol's bodily labor, practical thought, and moral self-management, with any widening kept chapter-level and earned by scene design.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Let long freighted sentences carry labor process, institutional language, or accumulating sensory load; then cut to shorter, grammatically complete sentences at impact points where a body, fact, or decision can no longer be blurred.
